issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were enrolling in multiple workflow branches simultaneously, causing home advisors and TCs to receive duplicate tasks across the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations, confirmed by HubSpot support. HubSpot resolved the underlying association and filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or reassign the duplicate tasks as needed.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks continued firing after deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Home advisors were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked the correct suppression filters to stop enrollment or unenroll contacts upon these deal stage changes. Madelaine tweaked the workflow filters on March 9 to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any erroneous check-in tasks received for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow did not re-trigger when deal stage flipped back to Offer Accepted after termination
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to an earlier stage after a contract fell through, and then moved back to Offer Accepted again, the workflow tasks for collecting closing info did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was missing from the workflow's re-enrollment criteria. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to include the Offer Accepted deal stage.
issues.workaround: For deals that went back under contract during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks, manually enroll the deal into the Offer Accepted workflow to generate the necessary closing info tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on a deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to the agent continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The issue affected at least one deal where the LO was changed to Julie Yocum but emails still referenced Paul. Luis resolved the issue on the same day it was reported.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually verify and resend agent-facing emails with the correct LO information.

issues.title: MRC and publisher deals not enrolling TCs into Offer Accepted workflow tasks
issues.desc: Deals from MRC and other publisher sources that were updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow or generating TC tasks. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and a fix was applied on April 1. The root cause was not explicitly disclosed by HubSpot.
issues.workaround: For MRC or publisher deals marked Offer Accepted during the impact window that did not generate TC tasks, manually enroll the deal into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually.
